```python
import os
import glob

# Search for the PDF in parent directories
search_paths = [
    "..",
    "../..",
    "../../..",
    "../fixtures",
    "../../fixtures",
    "../../../fixtures"
]

found_paths = []
for base in search_paths:
    if os.path.exists(base):
        pattern = os.path.join(base, "**/treasury_bulletin_1953_02.pdf")
        matches = glob.glob(pattern, recursive=True)
        found_paths.extend(matches)

print(f"Found {len(found_paths)} matches:")
for p in found_paths:
    print(f"  {p} ({os.path.getsize(p)} bytes)")

# Also list nearby PDFs
print("\nAll PDFs found:")
for base in ["..", "../.."]:
    if os.path.exists(base):
        pattern = os.path.join(base, "**/*.pdf")
        matches = glob.glob(pattern, recursive=True)
        for p in matches[:10]:
            print(f"  {p}")
